## You got Majordom running — welcome to the club!

We'd love to know about your setup. This isn't a bug report, just a chance to share what you built and help others who want to do the same.

<!-- or: home server with NVIDIA GPU -->

- [ ] Coolify
- [ ] Something else (describe below)

## Features you're using

- [ ] Web UI (CSV import)
- [ ] Telegram bot
- [ ] Chat assistant
- [ ] GPU acceleration for Ollama
